texto: The only antidote to the unnerving effects of such incoherence is integrity. People and organizations with integrity are wholly themselves. No aspect of self stands different or apart. At their center is clarity, not conflict. When they go inside to find themselves, there is only one self there.
explicacao: Citação de Margaret Wheatley sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “The only antidote to the unnerving effects of such incoherence is integrity. People and organizat…” articula autoestima, clarity, coherence em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como coherence e identity.
